sutta: monks those families where mother and father are worshiped in the home are reckoned like unto brahma those families where mother and father are worshiped in the home are ranked are ranked with the teachers of all worthy of offerings monks are those families where mother and father are worshiped in the home brahma amongst is a term for mother and father teaches of all monks is a term for mother and father worthy of offerings monks is a term for mother and father why so because mother and father do much for children they bring them up nourish and introduce them to the world
commentary: is another suta where the buddha is teaching us to have a lot of love and respect for our parents because we owe a lot to them if we have a lot of respect and love for our parents then even the divas have respect for us
